title: peucedanum hirsutiusculum
intro: Peucedanum hirsutiusculum, also known as small-hairy masterwort, is a plant species in the carrot family native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant actions, making it a potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing coughs and congestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Peucedanum hirsutiusculum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
